title: DERDUFT Floral & Fruity Wax Melts Set of 4 - Lavender, Jasmine, Rose, Cherry - 70.9g Each, Long-Lasting Fragrance, Perfect for Relaxation & Home Fragrance
features: Floral & Fruity Aromatherapy - Enjoy 4 vibrant fragrances - Lavender, Jasmine, Rose, and Cherry, perfect for creating a relaxing and calming atmosphere in your home, office, or any room
Ideal for Relaxation - These scented wax melts provide a therapeutic experience, helping to relieve stress and create a soothing environment with every use
Long-Lasting and Intense Fragrance - Each wax melt weighs 70.9g and releases a strong, long-lasting fragrance that fills your space with floral and fruity scents for hours
Easy to Use & Customizable - The melts are designed to be used with wax warmers or melt lamps. Each melt is segmented into 8 pieces, allowing you to adjust the fragrance intensity based on your needs
Perfect for Home & Gifts - Whether you're enhancing your home fragrance or looking for a thoughtful gift, these wax melts bring a touch of comfort, relaxation, and joy to any environment
